title: BoniMons [Cobblemon]
description: Datapack that adds a bunch of Pokemon that are missing in Cobblemon!
body:
This addon adds over 15 new Pokemon to Cobblemon:

- **Smolliv evolution line**![Smoliv, Dolliv and Arboliva](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f19b9357b2c9f7e51c3cd7568610a05c7ffb56df.png)

- **Silicobra and Sandaconda + Bramblin and Brambleghast**![Silicobra and Sandaconda + Bramblin and Brambleghast](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2da018b70b6d5be2dcd9ebc1ae95d97a1bce0144.png)

- **Clobbopus and Grapploct**![Clobbopus and Grapploct](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e11f72d1d5136404f8fda9f2c1b579fd2a85574f.png)

- **Bombirdier**
- **Furfrou**
- **Gouging Fire**
- **Fezandipiti and Okidogi**
- **Sandy Shocks**
- **An unfinished Cobalion**
